zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Hulton於大約1489年出生在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯時，他的父親Alan de Hulton43歲，母親Elizabeth Bradshaw35歲。他於大約1520年與Jane Stones在英國藍卡爾法爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年6月15日在英國藍卡爾博爾頓享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Hulton于大约1489年出生在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯时，他的父亲Alan de Hulton43岁，母亲Elizabeth Bradshaw35岁。他于大约1520年与Jane Stones在英国藍卡爾法爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年6月15日在英国藍卡爾博爾頓享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilton
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Hulton was born about 1489, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, his father, Alan de Hulton, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Bradshaw, was 35. He married Jane Stones about 1520, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 June 1544, in Bolton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Hulton est né environ 1489, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Hulton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bradshaw, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Jane Stones environ 1520, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1544, à Bolton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Hulton um 1489 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Hulton 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bradshaw 35. Er hat um 1520 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England Jane Stones geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1544 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bolton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Hulton è nato il circa 1489 nel Farnworth, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Alan de Hulton, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bradshaw, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Jane Stones circa 1520, nel Farnworth, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1544, nel Bolton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Hultonが約1489年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスで生まれた時，父Alan de Hultonは43歳，母Elizabeth Bradshawは35歳であった。約1520年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスでJane Stonesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年6月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアボルトンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Hulton(이)가 대략 1489년 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Hulton(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bradshaw(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1520년 영국 랭카실르 패른워스에서 Jane Stones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 6월 15일 영국 랭카실르 볼턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Hulton nasceu aproximadamente 1489, em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Hulton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bradshaw, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Stones aproximadamente 1520, em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1544, em Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Hulton родился около 1489 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Hulton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bradshaw, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Stones около 1520 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1544 г. в местности болтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Hulton nació aproximadamente 1489, en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Hulton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bradshaw, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Jane Stones aproximadamente 1520, en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1544, en Bolton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
